title: Eskom Board Meeting Q3 FY2024
agenda:
1. Load-shedding Reduction Progress
2. FY2024 Financial Results
3. JETP Implementation Update
4. Debt Relief Tranche 3
5. Unbundling Roadmap
minutes: Board reviewed load-shedding reduction to Stage 2 average. FY2024 loss of R54.6bn noted. JETP implementation on track. Debt relief tranche 3 of R78bn received.

resolutions.title: Approval of Eskom Just Energy Transition Plan
resolutions.description: Approve the Eskom Just Energy Transition Plan 2024-2034 including coal plant decommissioning schedule and renewable energy investment programme.

title: Transnet Board Meeting — Private Sector Participation
agenda:
1. Durban Container Terminal PSP Update
2. Rail Corridor Private Participation
3. Debt Restructuring Progress
4. Cable Theft Mitigation
minutes: Board approved Durban Container Terminal PSP framework. Three qualified bidders shortlisted. Rail corridor PSP for Ore Export Line approved in principle.

resolutions.title: Approval of Durban Container Terminal PSP Framework
resolutions.description: Approve the Private Sector Participation framework for Durban Container Terminal including concession structure, evaluation criteria and timeline.

title: SAA Board Meeting Q3 2024
location: Airways Park, OR Tambo International Airport
agenda:
1. Q3 Financial Results
2. Takatso Transaction Update
3. Route Network Expansion
4. Fleet Renewal Plan
minutes: Q3 revenue of R2.35bn reviewed. Takatso transaction conditions precedent 80% complete. New routes to Nairobi and Lagos approved for Q1 2025.

resolutions.title: Approval of Route Expansion to East and West Africa
resolutions.description: Approve new SAA routes to Nairobi (Kenya) and Lagos (Nigeria) commencing Q1 2025, subject to air service agreement approvals.

companyName: Airports Company South Africa SOC Limited
title: ACSA Board Meeting Q3 FY2024
location: ACSA Head Office, OR Tambo International Airport
agenda:
1. Q3 Financial Results
2. OR Tambo Solar Project Update
3. Cape Town Airport Expansion
4. Passenger Volume Forecast
minutes: Q3 revenue of R2.72bn exceeds target by 4.6%. OR Tambo 10MW solar project 85% complete. Cape Town expansion Phase 2 approved.

resolutions.title: Approval of Cape Town International Airport Phase 2 Expansion
resolutions.description: Approve R4.2bn Phase 2 expansion of Cape Town International Airport including new international pier and expanded terminal capacity.
